bird.name: Long-winged harrier
bird.summary: The long-winged harrier (Circus buffoni) is a common bird of prey species endemic to South America. They are members of the family Accipitr…

relations.subject: Long-winged harrier
relations.evidence: Their habitat also includes savanna, marshes and wetlands of South America
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Long-winged harrier
relations.evidence: Their habitat also includes savanna, marshes and wetlands of South America
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: Long-winged harrier
relations.evidence: Their habitat also includes savanna, marshes and wetlands of South America
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Long-winged harrier
relations.evidence: The long-winged harrier is classified as a species of least concern by the IUCN Red List, however their population has been observed to decline due to habitat degradation by human activity
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Long-winged harrier
relations.evidence: Although the species population has been found to be declining, the extended range of the long-winged harrier allows it to be classified as a species of 'least concern' by the IUCN Red List. Their population decline has been attributed to the degradation of its habitat, most notably wetlands, due to drainage, pollution, and other human-caused circumstances. No conservation efforts are currently in action concerning the long-winged harrier as an individual species, but their range occurs in a wide variety of conservation sites and protected areas
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

No conservation efforts are currently in action concerning the long-winged harrier as an individual species, but their range occurs in a wide variety of conservation sites and protected areas
relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
